delta.activation_all_rules_high.description: Incremental activation setup cost from every current rule, split payment, and five resolver writes.

delta.mint_all_rules_high.description: Incremental mint cost from every current rule, split payment, and five resolver writes.

delta.renew_all_rules_high.description: Incremental renewal cost from every current rule, split payment, and five resolver writes.

notes: Profile entries are standalone module-call measurements.
Use exact scenario keys when they match a production configuration.
Use slice profile tests with forge -vv for per-slice logs.

activation.all_rules_split_five_resolver.description: Activation with every current rule, split payment, and five resolver writes.

activation.free_no_rules.description: Activation with no rules, no payment, no hooks.

mint.all_rules_split_five_resolver_write.description: Controller mint with every current rule, split payment, and five resolver writes.

mint.free_no_rules.description: Controller mint with no rules, no payment, no hooks.

registry.register_buyer_roles.description: Direct ENSv2 registry register with buyer roles and no resolver.

registry.register_buyer_roles_resolver.description: Direct ENSv2 registry register with buyer roles and resolver.

registry.register_no_roles.description: Direct ENSv2 registry register with owner, no buyer roles, no resolver.

registry.reserve_no_owner.description: Direct ENSv2 registry reserve flow with owner set to zero.

renew.all_rules_split_five_resolver_writ.description: Controller renewal with every current rule, split payment, and five resolver writes.

renew.free_no_rules.description: Controller renewal with no rules, no payment, no hooks.

slice.activation.configure_modules.description: Call modules so they store activation-scoped params.

slice.activation.namespace_discovery.description: Resolve and prove the ENSv2 namespace registry for the activated name.
slice.activation.namespace_discovery.formula: ~42.7k fixed for `alice.eth`; varies with name depth and Universal Resolver implementation.

slice.activation.precondition_checks.description: Validate duration bounds, payment module approval, owner admin, controller roles, and unused activation id.

slice.activation.store_activation_record.description: Write activation owner, registries, namespace identity, label, resolver, bounds, payment, and module refs.

slice.activation.store_module_lists.description: Persist configured rule and post-hook module references.
slice.activation.store_module_lists.formula: ~0.6k if empty; if `rule_count > 1`, about ~0.6k + ~11.4k * `rule_count`; if `post_hook_count > 1`, add the packed hook-list SSTORE2 write.

slice.mint.activation_and_namespace_chec.description: Load activation, check active status, prove namespace currentness, owner admin, duration, and runtime data lengths.

slice.mint.label_context_and_tracking.description: Hash label, construct MintContext, and store label -> activation id for renewal checks.

slice.mint.payment_collection.description: Collect payment if the final rule price is nonzero.
slice.mint.payment_collection.formula: ~0.3k if free; direct ERC20 ~85k; split ERC20 ~= ~45.8k + ~30k * `payment_recipients`.

slice.mint.post_hooks.formula: ~0.4k if `post_hook_count = 0`; otherwise sum(`afterMint(hook_i)`). Batch resolver hook ~= ~77.7k + ~9.7k * `resolver_writes`.

slice.mint.registry_register.formula: ~105k-156k per mint depending buyer roles and resolver write path.

slice.mint.rule_engine.description: Evaluate configured rule modules and apply price effects in phase order.
slice.mint.rule_engine.formula: ~0.5k if `rule_count = 0`; otherwise SSTORE2 read when `rule_count > 1` + sum(`evaluateMint(rule_i, runtimeData_i)`) + output checks. Merkle rules add roughly ~2.5k * `proof_depth` inside that rule.

slice.renew.activation_and_namespace_che.description: Load activation, check active status, prove namespace currentness, owner admin, duration, and runtime data lengths.

slice.renew.label_state_and_context.description: Read label state, verify activation ownership, compute new expiry, and construct RenewContext.

slice.renew.payment_collection.description: Collect renewal payment if the final rule price is nonzero.
slice.renew.payment_collection.formula: ~0.3k if free; direct ERC20 ~81k; split ERC20 ~= ~43.5k + ~30k * `payment_recipients`.

slice.renew.post_hooks.formula: ~0.4k if `post_hook_count = 0`; otherwise sum(`afterRenew(hook_i)`). Current resolver hooks are no-op on renew, so most cost is hook dispatch.

slice.renew.registry_renew.formula: ~15.2k fixed when the registry state is warm in the controller flow.

slice.renew.rule_engine.description: Evaluate configured renewal rule modules and apply price effects in phase order.
slice.renew.rule_engine.formula: ~0.5k if `rule_count = 0`; otherwise SSTORE2 read when `rule_count > 1` + sum(`evaluateRenew(rule_i, runtimeData_i)`) + output checks. Merkle renewal rules add roughly ~2.5k * `proof_depth` when enabled.

payment.split_2.description: ERC20 split payment to two recipients.

payment.split_3.description: ERC20 split payment to three recipients.

payment.split_5.description: ERC20 split payment to five recipients.

payment_renew.split_2.description: ERC20 renewal split payment to two recipients.

payment_renew.split_3.description: ERC20 renewal split payment to three recipients.

payment_renew.split_5.description: ERC20 renewal split payment to five recipients.

rule.fixed_price_20_exact.description: FixedPriceRule with twenty overrides and exact-length hit.

rule.fixed_price_5_exact.description: FixedPriceRule with five overrides and exact-length hit.

rule.fixed_price_5_fallback.description: FixedPriceRule with five overrides and fallback label.

rule.length_premium_5_fallback.description: LengthPremiumRule with five buckets and fallback bucket.

rule.sale_window_bounded.description: SaleWindowRule evaluateMint with active start/end bounds.

rule.sale_window_open.description: SaleWindowRule evaluateMint with open zero-bounds config.

rule.token_balance_discount.description: TokenBalanceRule with minimum balance and discount.

rule_renew.fixed_price_20_exact.description: FixedPriceRule renewal with twenty overrides and exact-length hit.

rule_renew.fixed_price_5_exact.description: FixedPriceRule renewal with five overrides and exact-length hit.

rule_renew.fixed_price_5_fallback.description: FixedPriceRule renewal with five overrides and fallback label.

rule_renew.fixed_price_no_overrides.description: FixedPriceRule renewal with no length overrides.

rule_renew.label_class_letter.description: LabelClassRule renewal for ASCII letter labels.

rule_renew.length_premium_5_fallback.description: LengthPremiumRule renewal with five buckets and fallback bucket.

rule_renew.reservation_10.description: ReservationRule renewal with Merkle set size 10.

rule_renew.reservation_100.description: ReservationRule renewal with Merkle set size 100.

rule_renew.reservation_1000.description: ReservationRule renewal with Merkle set size 1000.

rule_renew.sale_window_bounded.description: SaleWindowRule evaluateRenew with active start/end bounds.

rule_renew.sale_window_open.description: SaleWindowRule evaluateRenew with open zero-bounds config.

rule_renew.token_balance_discount.description: TokenBalanceRule renewal with minimum balance and discount.

rule_renew.whitelist_10.description: WhitelistRule renewal with renew checks disabled.

rule_renew.whitelist_100.description: WhitelistRule renewal with renew checks disabled.

rule_renew.whitelist_1000.description: WhitelistRule renewal with renew checks disabled.
